view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for pre-arrival and post-departure inspection signatures.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Pre-arrival and post-departure inspection signatures' but did not provide any concrete evidence or checks performed to confirm that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case outlines various signature needs, but there is no evidence confirming the implementation or validation of these signatures in the current saga run. Therefore, the lack of evidence leads to the conclusion that the validation is inconclusive.
